response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume does not align well with the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows or the capital markets/fixed income domain. While he has extensive experience in C and C++, his recent roles focus heavily on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern web technologies, with no clear evidence of Windows-based C++ development in financial systems. His financial domain exposure is limited to investment practices in Germany, not capital markets or fixed income. SQL experience is present but not emphasized. The mismatch in core technical skills and domain expertise significantly reduces his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals with diverse language experience (C, C++, D, JavaScript)
Demonstrated ability to work in fast-paced environments with CI/CD and testing practices
Clear passion for software craftsmanship and knowledge sharing through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial experience with Windows-based C++ development (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income (mandatory requirement)
Recent work heavily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and modern web technologies, not aligned with the role's technical stack
